context: Tests whether the agent constructs the evaluation workspace with the correct directory layout, file naming conventions, and artifact schemas. Key items include the workspace location relative to the skill, iteration subdirectories, descriptive eval directory names, timing.json structure, grading.json field names, and benchmark aggregation.

checklist.name: Workspace sibling location
checklist.description: The workspace directory is created as `markdown-to-pdf-workspace/` (or similar `<skill-name>-workspace/`) as a sibling to the `skills/` or skill directory — NOT inside the skill folder itself

checklist.name: Iteration subdirectory
checklist.description: Results are organized under an `iteration-1/` subdirectory within the workspace

checklist.name: Descriptive eval directory names
checklist.description: Eval subdirectories have descriptive names based on what they test (e.g., `readme-conversion/`, `technical-spec-with-tables/`) rather than generic names like `eval-0` or `eval-1`

checklist.name: With-skill and baseline runs
checklist.description: Each eval directory contains both a `with_skill/` and a `without_skill/` (or `old_skill/`) subdirectory

checklist.name: eval_metadata.json fields
checklist.description: Each eval directory contains an `eval_metadata.json` with the fields: `eval_id`, `eval_name`, `prompt`, and `assertions`

checklist.name: timing.json fields
checklist.description: Each run directory (with_skill/ and without_skill/) contains a `timing.json` with the fields: `total_tokens`, `duration_ms`, and `total_duration_seconds`

checklist.name: grading.json uses correct field names
checklist.description: Each run's grading.json uses `text`, `passed`, and `evidence` as the field names in the expectations array — NOT `name`/`met`/`details` or other variants

checklist.name: benchmark.json exists
checklist.description: A `benchmark.json` file is present at the iteration level (iteration-1/benchmark.json)

checklist.name: With-skill before baseline in benchmark
checklist.description: In benchmark.json (or benchmark.md), each with_skill configuration appears before its corresponding baseline (without_skill) counterpart

checklist.name: No upfront empty directories
checklist.description: The directory structure contains actual files — there are no empty placeholder directories created speculatively for future evals that don't yet exist

checklist.name: outputs subdirectory present
checklist.description: Each run directory contains an `outputs/` subdirectory (even if empty or with stub files) where the skill's actual output files would be saved
